_meta.keyKnowledge: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' design ideas, concepts and solutions to inform our decisions throughout the design process.

_source.w: We reflect on, analyse, evaluate and document our own and others' design ideas, concepts and solutions to inform our decisions throughout the design process.
y: Critical evaluation of design is essential for continuous improvement and professional development.
Analysing how other designers solve problems provides valuable insights for our own practice.
Comprehensive documentation demonstrates the depth and rigour of our design thinking.
eg: We maintain detailed design folios documenting our research, process and reflections.
We analyse professional design work and discuss how designers solve complex communication problems.
We evaluate our designs against briefs, audience needs and professional standards.
We compare different design solutions to similar problems and evaluate their effectiveness.
We use feedback from peers, teachers and target audiences to refine our designs.
We articulate our design rationale with precision and clarity.
